title: Infinite Raid
description: A mod that adds a constant, unending raid, with only a brief reprieve when you win.
body:
**Infinite Raid** is an extremely simple mod inspired by [Luke TheNotable's "100 Days - [Minecraft INFINITE RAID]" video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1CwOSDIrP0s)

The mod has two main elements:
1. So long as they are in a village, the player constantly has the Raid Omen effect, unless they have just won a raid, in which case they get a break from the infinite raid for the duration of the Hero Of The Village effect.
2. Every 20 days, the level of Raid Omen increases by one stage.

Note: This has not been tested for multiplayer compatibility, but it should work as normal.
